name: Memory Lane
description: Your goal in each level is to reach the Goal Platform without falling or touching enemies. Levels are played in two phases. A. Reveal Phase: Duration: Short preview at the start of each level • All platforms become visible. • You cannot move. • Study the layout, paths, traps, and pickups. Your task: Remember what you see. ________________________________________ B. Action Phase: • All memory phase platforms become invisible unless they are marked to stay visible. • Touching platforms reveals them permanently. Your task: Reach the goal using your memory and reflexes.
instructions: Movement bull Left Right A D or Left Right Arrow keys bull Jump Tap space once to jump bull Hold space for a higher jump arc bull Double Jump available only when powered up Mobile Controls Touch buttons appear automatically on mobile devices
